perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap and glasses introduces a sign for the 'Vivo Vision Discovery Edition'. (2) He demonstrates the magnetic clip-on lenses for users with myopia, clicking them into the headset. (3) He showcases the external battery pack and follows the connection cable to the side of the device. (4) Detailed close-up shots highlight the Home button, volume rockers, and the USB-C charging port. (5) The man wears the headset and performs a calibration process using his hands and eyes. (6) A digital overlay screen recording shows the device's main menu, movie playback features, and gesture-based resizing of windows. (7) He participates in a virtual rhythm game, physically tapping the air to match the game's visuals. (8) He gives a summary of the 8K experience while holding the headset for the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice speaks in Mandarin over a light, upbeat electronic background track. (2) Subtle mechanical clicking sounds occur when the host interacts with the hardware components. (3) During the gaming segment, melodic electronic music and rhythmic sound effects (SFX) are heard, synchronized with the visuals. (4) The ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a controlled indoor environment. (5) The audio ends with a concluding statement from the host.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Full subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the narration. (2) Decorative Text: Top left branding '3c有趣思tim哥' and Instagram handle '@3ctim'. (3) Hook Text: Large font variety-style captions like 'Tim哥', '8K', and '體感感' emphasize specific features or reactions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Hardware Inspection -> UX Calibration -> Gameplay Demo -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 primary male tech influencer appearing throughout the sequence.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt featuring a 'Human Made' hamburger logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor space with wooden fixtures, product signage, and a brightly lit demo table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Hardware Features -> Hands-on Experience -> Summary Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's core objective is to showcase the practical usage and high-resolution capabilities of the Vivo Vision Discovery Edition headset. By demonstrating hardware modularity (lenses) and immersive software (rhythm games), the influencer provides a comprehensive first impression for tech-savvy viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of a new product with brand logos prominently displayed and positive verbal evaluation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'Tim哥' persona and signature white branded t-shirts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video's high density of text overlays and fast-paced editing is optimized for short-form social media platforms to maintain viewer engagement.
